tools.name: clients.clientOptions
tools.description: Gets languages supported by the client generator

tools.name: clients.downloadFile
tools.description: A valid `fileId` is generated by the `/clients/{language}` or `/servers/{language}` POST operations.  The fileId code can be used just once, after which a new `fileId` will need to be requested.

tools.name: clients.generateClient
tools.description: Accepts a `GeneratorInput` options map for spec location and generation options

tools.name: clients.getClientOptions
tools.description: Returns options for a client library

tools.name: servers.generateServerForLanguage
tools.description: Accepts a `GeneratorInput` options map for spec location and generation options.

tools.name: servers.getServerOptions
tools.description: Returns options for a server framework

tools.name: servers.serverOptions
tools.description: Gets languages supported by the server generator

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
